qry:select.name: WORKFLOW
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WF.oi_wf, WF.oi_organigrama, WF.c_wf, WF.d_wf, WF.e_version, PRO.oi_process from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO join WF.oi_wf inner PRO.oi_wf where PRO.oi_process = {$SOURCE/@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PROCESS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PRO.oi_process, PRO.c_process, PRO.d_process, PRO.e_automatico FROM WRK01_PROCESS as PRO, WRK01_PROCESS as FIL JOIN PRO.oi_wf INNER FIL.oi_wf, PRO.c_process INNER FIL.c_process WHERE FIL.oi_process={$SOURCE/@oi_process} ORDER BY e_automatico ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NODOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT NODES.oi_process, NODES.oi_node, NODES.c_type, NODES.d_label, NODES.n_secuence FROM WRK01_NODES as NODES, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO, WRK01_PROCESS as FIL JOIN PRO.oi_wf INNER FIL.oi_wf, PRO.c_process INNER FIL.c_process, PRO.oi_process INNER NODES.oi_process WHERE FIL.oi_process={$SOURCE/@oi_process} ORDER BY n_secuence asc ')/ROWS/ROW, $p in $SOURCE/PRO join $r/@oi_process inner $p/@id

qry:select.name: PARAMS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PARA.oi_param, PARA.oi_node, PARA.c_param, PARA.d_param, PARA.c_type, PARA.e_subproceso, PARA.e_orden, PARA.c_var, PARA.o_formula FROM WRK01_NODE_PARAMS as PARA, WRK01_NODES as NODES, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO, WRK01_PROCESS as FIL JOIN PRO.oi_wf INNER FIL.oi_wf, PRO.c_process INNER FIL.c_process, PRO.oi_process INNER NODES.oi_process, PARA.oi_node INNER NODES.oi_node WHERE FIL.oi_process={$SOURCE/@oi_process} ORDER BY e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW, $p in $SOURCE/PRO/NODE join $r/@oi_node inner $p/@oi_node

qry:select.name: ROLES
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ROL.oi_role, ROL.c_role, ROL.d_role, ROL.d_color, ROL.l_unique
FROM WRK05_ROLES as ROL WHERE ROL.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@oi_organigrama} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ROLES_PROCESS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ROL.oi_role_process, ROL.c_rol, ROL.l_iniciar FROM WRK01_ROLES_PRO as ROL WHERE ROL.oi_process={#SOURCE:@oi_process} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTADOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ETA.oi_estado, ETA.oi_wf, ETA.c_estado, ETA.d_estado, ETA.c_color FROM WRK01_ESTADOS as ETA WHERE ETA.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW
